# Lottie Vendor Files

This directory contains the `lottie-web` browser player used by ro-totem's UI.

- `lottie.min.js`: minified browser player from `lottie-web` 5.13.0.
- `LICENSE.md`: upstream MIT license.
- `package.json`: upstream package metadata for the vendored version.

Source package:

```text
https://www.npmjs.com/package/lottie-web/v/5.13.0
```
